senses.gloss: to become a young adult, to grow up
to be brisk, to be lively, to be sprightly
to raise one's head (as when trying to reach or look at something), to stand on the tiptoes, to stretch up

examples.text: كان هناك ولد صغير يتكلّم ويحاول أن يشبّ على أصابعه لينظر من النافذة.
examples.english: There was a small boy talking and trying to rear on his toes to look through the window.

senses.gloss: to raise the forelegs, to prance
to kindle, to inflame, to ignite (also figuratively, such as of war kindled)
to kindle, to inflame, to ignite (also figuratively, such as of war kindled); to break out

to raise, to lift; to heighten; to highlight, to intensify (also figuratively, and particularly if done with colours or when referring to physical qualities and attributes, such as beauty and attractiveness)
verbal noun of شَبَّ (šabba, “to raise; to kindle”) (form I)
